name: openrouter-mcp
description: Discover OpenRouter models and generate images, video, and speech (and describe images) from Claude.
long_description: A single Rust binary that exposes OpenRouter to Claude over MCP. Discover models with their capabilities and pricing, generate and edit images (with parallel seed-stepped variants and a sidecar manifest), generate video (text-to-video / image-to-video, async with poll-by-task_id), generate speech (text-to-speech), describe local images with a vision model, and track per-process usage. Bring your own OpenRouter API key.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List available OpenRouter models with capabilities and pricing; filter and sort server-side.

tools.name: describe_model
tools.description: Get the full detail for a single model by id: description, architecture, context, benchmarks, and per-provider endpoints (pricing, uptime, supported parameters).

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate or edit an image with an OpenRouter image model and save it to disk (supports parallel variants).

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate a video from a prompt (text-to-video) or from first/last frames (image-to-video) with an OpenRouter video model; runs async, poll get_result by task_id.

tools.name: generate_audio
tools.description: Generate speech (text-to-speech) from text with an OpenRouter TTS model and save it to disk.

tools.name: get_result
tools.description: Fetch the status and result of a generation job by task_id.

tools.name: describe_image
tools.description: Describe or answer questions about local image(s) with a vision-capable model.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Return info about the OpenRouter API key in use: label, credit usage, limits, and tier.

tools.name: get_usage_stats
tools.description: Return in-memory usage statistics for this server process.

tools.name: reset_usage_stats
tools.description: Reset all in-memory usage statistics to zero (requires confirm=true).

api_key.title: OpenRouter API Key
api_key.description: Your OpenRouter API key. Create one at https://openrouter.ai/keys
